questions.question: What is the target for Order Confirmation Rate (KPI 1.1), and what is its formula?

options.text: ≥ 95%; Confirmed Orders ÷ Total Shipped Orders × 100
≥ 99%; Total 1st Attempted Orders ÷ Total Orders Received × 100
≥ 97%; Orders Delivered ÷ Orders Shipped × 100
100%; Orders Approved ÷ Orders Assigned × 100

questions.question: An executive's Non Attempted Pending column shows 3 orders at 5:30 PM. What must they do?

options.text: Log the 3 orders in Remarks and log off — they will be carried forward automatically
Action the 3 orders immediately before EOD; any order in Non Attempted Pending is a gap against KPI 1.2
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager — non-attempted orders require manager authorisation
No action needed — the target is <1%, and 3 orders may still be within tolerance

questions.question: What is the target for Cancellation Retention Rate (KPI 1.3), and at what level is it reviewed?

options.text: ≥ 90%; reviewed daily per executive
≥ 95% retained; reviewed monthly at team level
≥ 80%; reviewed weekly per executive
≥ 99%; reviewed daily at team level

questions.question: What is the target NDR Rate (KPI 2.1), and at what percentage does it become "Poor"?

options.text: ≤ 5%; above 10% = Poor
≤ 3%; above 5% = Poor
≤ 1%; above 3% = Poor
≤ 3%; above 3% = Poor

questions.question: What is the target NDR Success Rate (KPI 2.2), and what does it measure?

options.text: ≥ 90%; percentage of NDR orders that are returned to origin
≥ 75%; percentage of NDR orders that are ultimately delivered successfully
≥ 50%; percentage of NDR orders resolved within 24 hours
≥ 95%; percentage of NDR orders with at least one reattempt

questions.question: What are the 5 daily columns that must ALL read zero by EOD for SLA Adherence (KPI 3.1)?

options.text: Pending NDRs, Pending Orders, Pending Callbacks, Pending Mails, Pending Reviews
Pending Tickets (BIK), Pending Social Media (IG), Pending Social Media (FB), Pending Social Media (YT), Pending Mails
Approved, Grand Total, Retained, Cancelled, Non Attempted
Connected, Missed, Not Reached, Pending Follow-Up, Callback Pending

questions.question: What is the target IBC Connect Rate (KPI 3.2)?

options.text: > 90% connected; ≤ 5% pending follow-ups on missed calls
> 95% connected; ≤ 1% pending follow-ups on missed calls
100% connected; 0% missed calls allowed
> 85% connected; ≤ 3% pending follow-ups on missed calls

questions.question: An executive's Missed Call (Follow Up Pending) column shows 2 at EOD. What must happen?

options.text: Action them first thing next working day before starting new work
Log them in Remarks and they will expire after 48 hours
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager for reassignment
No action — missed calls are not tracked against individual performance

questions.question: How many daily columns must the executive check during the EOD self-review, and what is the deadline?

options.text: 7 columns; submit by 7 PM
11 columns; submit all sheets by 6 PM
5 columns; submit by 5:30 PM
14 columns; submit by 6:30 PM

questions.question: During EOD self-review, a column shows a non-zero value that the executive cannot action before logout. What must they do?

options.text: Clear the value by setting it to zero manually — the sheet must be clean at logout
Leave it and action it the next day without documentation
Log the reason in the Remarks column before logging off
Escalate to CRM Manager via Slack before logging off

questions.question: To review personal performance for the current week on the Dashboard, what date filter should be set?

options.text: Set both From and To to today's date
Set From to Monday and To to Sunday of the current week
Set From to the 1st and To to the last day of the current month
No filter needed — the Dashboard always shows the current week

questions.question: In the Task Analytics tab, which column indicates that a task type has unresolved items?

options.text: Total column — any value above zero
Resolved column — if below the Total count
Pending column — any non-zero value means an unresolved task
Status column — any entry marked "Open"

questions.question: In the monthly performance evaluation, what does the label "Need to work" mean?

options.text: At or above the target benchmark
Below target but within acceptable tolerance
Below acceptable range — needs active improvement
Significantly below target — escalation or remediation required

questions.question: What is the target for KRA 4 (SOP Adherence), and which of the following is a common SOP breach trigger?

options.text: 95%; not logging NDR attempts in the sheet
99%; not updating FIMS after every action
100%; arriving late to shift
90%; not using the Dashboard tab daily

questions.question: In the SWOT self-analysis, what does the status label "WIP" mean, and how often should SWOT items be reviewed?

options.text: "Work in Progress" — reviewed quarterly with CRM Manager
"Work in Progress" — you are working on it but not yet consistent; reviewed monthly during one-on-one with Team Leader
"Waiting for Input" — pending Manager feedback; reviewed bi-weekly
"Well Implemented Practice" — confirmed strength; reviewed annually
